exercises.title: break: Exit Early
exercises.description: break exits a loop immediately when a condition is met. Find the first multiple of 7 greater than 50 and stop.
hints: n % 7 == 0 checks if n is divisible by 7.
break immediately exits the loop when the condition is True.

exercises.title: continue: Skip an Iteration
exercises.description: continue skips the rest of the loop body for the current iteration and moves to the next. Print only the odd numbers from 1 to 10.
hints: i % 2 == 0 is True for even numbers.
continue skips to the next iteration without printing.

exercises.title: for-else: Loop with Optional Epilogue
exercises.description: A for loop can have an else clause that runs only if the loop completed without hitting break. Use it to search for a value.
exercises.expectedOutput:
Found 19 in the list.
99 was not found.
hints: The else clause of a for loop runs only if the loop finished without break.
If break was triggered, the else is skipped.

warmup.title: Quick Recall: break and continue
warmup.description: break exits the loop; continue skips to next iteration. What does this print?
